title: coding/work session
text:
You are summarizing a coding/work session. Create a compact summary that preserves:
  - What was accomplished (files created, modified, deleted)
  - Key decisions and why they were made
  - What worked and what failed (so mistakes aren't repeated)
  - Current state of the project
  - Any unfinished tasks or next steps

  Format as a brief structured summary with sections. Be concise — this replaces the full conversation. Drop all
  back-and-forth, debugging noise, and intermediate tool outputs. Focus on outcomes and lessons.
